top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran still without deal to end war after Trump says he's not in a 'hurry'
top_signals.summary: Trump threatened further military action if negotiations break down and the U.S. does not receive the concessions from Iran it desires.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

alerts.title: U.S. and Iran still without deal to end war after Trump says he's not in a 'hurry'
alerts.summary: Trump threatened further military action if negotiations break down and the U.S. does not receive the concessions from Iran it desires.
